summary: Both DeepSeek and HuggingFace v2 templates successfully render APF warning in chat UI. DeepSeek shows full warning text in chat bubble. HuggingFace shows warning text with 1-chunk NDJSON delivery.

results.warning_text_observed:
이 서비스는 회사 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 업무용 AI 서비스만 이용해 주세요.

This service has been blocked by company security policy.

ui_behavior.chat_bubble: Warning text rendered in assistant chat bubble
ui_behavior.network: SSE response intercepted by APF, single chunk delivered

key_findings: deepseek_sse_v2 template works correctly with parent_id, thinking_enabled, update_session event
Warning text fully rendered in DeepSeek chat bubble UI
No 400 error or charset issues (previous deepseek_sse_v1 problems resolved)
XHR transport handles APF-injected SSE response properly

results.warning_text_observed: ⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

ui_behavior.chat_bubble: Warning text rendered in assistant chat bubble with ⚠ icon
ui_behavior.title_change: STREAM_17064_1chunks (1 chunk = APF injected NDJSON response)
ui_behavior.stop_generating: Initially showed 'Stop generating' then completed normally
ui_behavior.console_errors: 26 warnings in console (HuggingFace framework warnings, not APF-related)
ui_behavior.network: Content-Type text/event-stream forced H2 SSE path, no Content-Length header

key_findings: huggingface_ndjson_v2 Content-Type change to text/event-stream successfully forces H2 SSE path
Content-Length header removed, enabling streaming mode
Warning text displayed in HuggingFace chat bubble with warning icon
Only 1 chunk delivered (APF response), stream completed normally
fetch ReadableStream transport handles APF-injected NDJSON properly

overall_assessment: Both v2 templates are production-ready. DeepSeek deepseek_sse_v2 resolves all previous 400/charset issues. HuggingFace huggingface_ndjson_v2 Content-Type change successfully enables streaming warning delivery. Both services now show APF warning text in their native chat UI.
